p1.title: Evidence artifacts not yet present during Claude review
p1.line_or_area: contracts/control-plane-contract.json (current_subphase, subphase_closeouts S03-S11); scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs (subphase_closeouts construction-inspection loop); docs/closeout-packs/cp00-051/*
p1.issue: Contract asserts completion not yet backed by evidence. current_subphase and subphase_closeouts S03-S11 are marked status=production_ready with closeout_pack_ref CP00-051 and evidence_root docs/closeout-packs/cp00-051, and the validator requires a per-subphase construction-inspection file with control_plane_hermes_evidence_packet_boundary_suite_verified===true for each of the 9 units. Those files do not exist yet, so rp00:control-plane:validate fails and the closeout is not actually complete.
p1.recommendation: Known/expected remaining workflow step per the preliminary validation result, not a code defect. It is the single blocker to full closeout.
p1.adjudication: Resolved by creating CP00-051 manifest, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection with control_plane_hermes_evidence_packet_boundary_suite_verified=true, followed by final validators.

p2.title: Plan and weighted ledger confirmation required
p2.issue: New validator logic hard-depends on files not present in this diff: docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json must contain a CP00-051 entry (risk_class A, planned_unit_count/unit_count 9, deviation_from_plan false, source live_correction_before_requested_locked_queue, non-empty correction_reason, included_units S03-S11), and docs/weighted-implementation-ledger.json must contain S03-S11 with terminal=true only on S11 and correct nextSubphaseId chaining.
p2.recommendation: Diff is only self-consistent if these pre-existing scaffolded files already match. The reported preliminary result (validate failing solely on missing evidence files) indicates they do; explicitly confirm before merge.
p2.adjudication: Resolved by closeout-pack-plan validation, weighted validation, and RP00 validator checks confirming CP00-051 plan binding and RP00.P02.M08.S03-S11 weighted boundaries.

p3.title: Cross-tenant denied path still returns source_micro_phase_completed===true and next_subphase===RP00.P02.M09.S01
p3.issue: Cross-tenant denied path still returns source_micro_phase_completed===true and next_subphase===RP00.P02.M09.S01; the result validator hard-requires both, so the boundary suite always 'completes' and hands off even when tenant_boundary_decision is deny_cross_tenant_boundary.
p3.impact: Defensible for a metadata-only boundary suite with no runtime enforcement, but completion semantics do not reflect the precheck denial and could surprise a future reader. No security impact since nothing is executed or persisted.
p3.adjudication: Accepted as non-blocking because CP00-051 is a metadata-only no-write boundary suite; future semantic hardening can split denial-completion nuance and explicit Matter requirements without blocking this pack.

p3.title: matter_id and matter_tenant_id fall back to synthetic defaults (matter.synthetic.control-plane / tenant_id) when absent
p3.issue: matter_id and matter_tenant_id fall back to synthetic defaults (matter.synthetic.control-plane / tenant_id) when absent from the normalized request; matter_id is not in the required input field set.
p3.impact: Acceptable in synthetic metadata-only context, but matter-trace precheck (S04) may operate on a defaulted identifier rather than a request-supplied one.
p3.adjudication: Accepted as non-blocking because CP00-051 is a metadata-only no-write boundary suite; future semantic hardening can split denial-completion nuance and explicit Matter requirements without blocking this pack.

boundary_checks.no_runtime_route: PASS - runtime_route_created:false; doesNotCreateRuntimeRoute:true; no route registration in assembler
boundary_checks.no_service_logic_execution: PASS - service_logic_execution_permitted:false; doesNotExecuteServiceLogic:true; assembler is a pure metadata function returning a frozen object
boundary_checks.no_hermes_validation_runtime_evidence: PASS - hermes_runtime/validation/evidence_creation permitted all false; no Hermes calls; create/run/persist evidence-packet claims forbidden
boundary_checks.no_database_storage_product_state_writes: PASS - database/storage/product_state permitted all false; no_write_scope all false; result frozen and returned, never persisted
boundary_checks.no_idempotency_lock_audit_writes: PASS - idempotency_record/runtime_lock/audit_event write permitted all false; idempotency_key and audit_hint_ref are metadata strings only; lock_not_acquired_metadata_boundary_only
boundary_checks.human_approval_preserved: PASS - replace_human_approval and authorize_request in forbidden claims; doesNotReplaceHumanApproval:true
boundary_checks.fail_closed: PASS - rejects non-hermes_evidence_packet entrypoint, non-S02 normalization, non-RP00.P02.M08 source, forbidden claims, and unknown claims (any non-false claim value throws); cross-tenant drift records denial and appends blocked_claim_ref
boundary_checks.plan_binding: PASS - deviation_from_plan:false; packId/plannedPackId CP00-051; exactly 9 units S03-S11 enforced; correction_reason recorded referencing live CP00-050
boundary_checks.handoff: PASS - completes_source_micro_phase RP00.P02.M08; next_subphase RP00.P02.M09.S01; current_subphase advanced to S11; production_ready flag added to closeout_requirements

parsed_review.recommendation: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS. The code and contract diff is internally consistent, fail-closed, and preserves every required boundary (no runtime route, no service logic, no Hermes runtime/validation/evidence, no database/storage/product-state/idempotency/lock/audit writes, synthetic-only data, human approval intact); preliminary node --check, 597 unit tests, and the contract/code validator cross-checks all pass. Before final closeout: (1) create the docs/closeout-packs/cp00-051 evidence so each S03-S11 construction-inspection sets control_plane_hermes_evidence_packet_boundary_suite_verified:true and rp00:control-plane:validate passes (P1, the only blocker); (2) confirm the pre-existing closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-051 entry and weighted-ledger S03-S11 boundaries match, since neither file is in this diff (P2). The denied-path completion semantics and matter_id defaulting (P3) are acceptable as-is given the metadata-only scope.
